productDisplayName: Puma Men El rey Riddim 50s OC Grey Casual Shoes
description: Absolutely stylish, comfortable and different, the puma EI Rey Riddim 50s OC sneakers are great for urban wear. Team these with jeans and tees and make a statement wherever you go. Upper Printed canvas upper for protection, comfort and style Rubber flap over the midfoot slit for easy insertion and removal of the feet cat logo engraved over the rubber flap abd printed behind the collar Midsole Cushioned footbed for all-day comfort EVA midsole for better shock absorption Outsole Durable rubber outsole with thatched pattern for better grip and traction
